```sql
SELECT *
FROM snowflake.account_usage.automatic_clustering_history
WHERE database_name = 'BENCH2COST'
  AND schema_name   = 'STOCKHOUSE'
  AND table_name    = 'QUOTES'
ORDER BY start_time DESC;
```
